org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure

Interface BlockFigure

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Comparable<ViewComponent>, Figure, PropertyOwner, Selectable, Serializable, ViewComponent
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BitmapFigure, BitmapNodeFigure, BlockDecorationFigure, CircleNodeFigure, CoercedBitmapFigure, CoercedTextFigure, EllipseFigure, EllipseNodeFigure, FSMEndPointFigure, FSMStartPointFigure, FSMStateFigure, NodeFigure, RectangleFigure, RectangleNodeFigure, RoundRectangleNodeFigure, SquareNodeFigure, TextFigure

    public interface BlockFigure
extends Figure
    This interface represents a figure that is drawn as a block.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig
